# altor-vec
> Client-side vector search library. 54KB. Sub-millisecond performance.

## Docs
- [Homepage](https://altorlab.dev)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/Altor-lab/altor-vec)
- [Blog](https://altorlab.dev/blog/)

## Key Features
- 54KB bundle size
- Sub-millisecond vector similarity search
- Runs entirely in the browser
- No server required
- HNSW algorithm implementation
- Works with any embedding model

## Use Cases
- Semantic search in web apps
- Autocomplete with embeddings
- Offline-first search
- Browser-based RAG
- Product recommendation engines
- Privacy-preserving search (no data leaves the browser)

## Install
npm install altor-vec
